signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.16% YoY, Up from 2.00% in February | YES | HIGH confidence**[1]

This figure, just released for March 2026, marks a 0.16 percentage point increase and exceeds the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid rising oil prices and a weakening won (recently at 1,520 per USD), potentially influencing prediction markets on BoK rate decisions or economic forecas

signals.headline: US Blockade of Iranian Ports in Strait of Hormuz Begins After Failed Ceasefire Talks | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US Blockade of Iranian Ports in Strait of Hormuz Begins After Failed Ceasefire Talks | NO | HIGH confidence**  
The US naval blockade took effect around midnight Australian Eastern time (late April 13 UTC), enforcing control over access to Iran's ports to compel reopening of the Strait and a permanent ceasefire, following collapsed talks in Islamabad led by VP JD Vance[1][2][3].
